title: Released xeloc.
body:
Thank you for downloading.
Xeloc is a simple XRP Ledger Client.
It operates with minimal transaction fees.
Please feel free to use it.
[![テストバナー](https://dev.majili.com/testbanner.png)](https://xeloc.dxl-labs.dev/)
[App site.](https://xeloc.dxl-labs.dev/)
[Developer site.](https://dxl-labs.dev/)
